[Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 5/12 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Students: 3★ Yuuka (Track), 3★ Mari (Track)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 5/12 (Tue) After Maintenance – 5/26 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
